case_title: TANYA CLARKSON VS. STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE, INC.

docket_entries.description: ORDER CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE (SEE SCANNED ORDER FOR DETAILS)
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL FILED BY PLAINTIFF CLARKSON, TANYA AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE, INC.
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF - (NO FEE FOR SERVICE STATED) SERVED MAR-26-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE, INC.
ORDER RE: CONTINUANCE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF FEB-26-2018 - CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE TO APR-26-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506 PLAINTIFF TANYA CLARKSON IS PRESENT. DEFENDANT IS NOT PRESENT. NO PROOF OF SERVICE. NO EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE PRO TEM: ANDREA MCGARY; CLERK: G. FELICIANO; NOT REPORTED. 506
ORDER RE: CONTINUED FOR PROOF OF SERVICE (SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT FOR DETAILS)
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $3,000.00 FILED BY CLARKSON, TANYA AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE, INC. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR FEB-26-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506

PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NO SUCH STREET - UNABLE TO FORWARD." COURT CERTIFIED MAIL RETURNED UNSERVED AS TO DEFENDANT STEVEN SHELL AUTO SERVICE, INC.

SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF APR-26-2018 -MATTER SETTLED - CONTINUED FOR PROGRESS REPORT TO MAY-30-2018 AT 3:30 PM IN DEPT. 506. IF NO APPEARANCE, CASE DISMISSED WITH PREJUDICE; JPT: MICHAEL MAU; CLERK: B. PAREDES; NOT REPORTED (506)
THE COURT ORDERS DISMISSAL OF THE ENTIRE ACTION WITH PREJUDICE.
REMARK:FILE DESTROYED PER ORDER SIGNED BY JUDGE SAMUEL FENG ON 2/16/2022 PURSUANT TO GOVERNMENT CODE SECTION 681.53.
